CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateDenseRanked(1, arr, 1) FROM complex_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_array_table (id UInt32, arr Array(Array(Int32)));
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateDenseRanked(1, arr, 2) FROM nested_array_table;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT m.id, arrayEnumerateDenseRanked(1, m.arr, 1) FROM multi_table m JOIN complex_table c ON m.id = c.id;
